Gifting
An easy to use app that makes the gifting process easy.
Product Sourcing
Leverage global sourcing to find the perfect company swag.

Quickly build, launch, and manage a variety of swag stores.

Curate and distribute kits to engage with your audience.
Fulfillment
Reliable delivery that gets your swag where it needs to go.

Teams

Marketing
Connect, convert, and captivate your target audience.
Sales
Accelerate pipeline with tools that build loyal customers.
People Ops
Boost retention and engagement across your teams.
Procurement
Maximize ROI and save your teams time and stress.

Problems We Solve

Wasted time
Save hours spent managing traditional swag purchases.
Disorganization
Keep all your swag projects clean and tidy with the app.
Poor Communication
Get quick responses with live chat and dedicated support.
Boring Creative
Go beyond just a logo and launch meaningful campaigns.
Lack of Visibility
Transparent real-time insights across your teams and accounts.

Testimonials

Read what our amazing clients say

Book a Demo
West Monroe
Digital Services Firm
Wastequip
Equipment Manufacturer
Apartments.com
Real Estate Software

“I've cut the time I spend handling company
swag by nearly 95%”

Madison handles swag for a 2,000+ employee digital services firm. After taking over the swag program, she quickly realized she needed an expert. West Monroe's swag requests flow through the platform, getting Madison out of the weeds and letting her focus on the high level decision making.

Madison Mize
Manager, Visual Design

“The best anyone could ask for... doing business with them is simple and stress free!”

It's an amazing solution that allows us to get our new employees a welcome kit within a few days. From the admin side, I like that it only takes a few seconds to send an invitation to the employee, it is easy to view our current inventory, and it is easy to order more products. We don't have to deal with the hassle of storage and regular invoicing makes payment simple.

Savana Fuchs
Executive Assistant

"For a vendor to have both quality products and flexible technology...it's HUGE for us"

Apartments.com was looking to do a  gift to their prospects that would be functional year round. They also wanted to connect the physical item to digital experience. We sourced custom calendars and built a custom landing page app so their customers could enter monthly swag contests.

John Le
Marketing Manager

Schedule a demo today and get started for free

Say hello to a new platform that makes managing company swag fun and simple.
